Open platform, our roadmap. We build toward a specific product thesis and optimize for it over
breadth — a well-built feature that
doesn't fit the roadmap may still be declined. Opening this issue BEFORE investing in a large PR is
the point: it saves you the work if it's out of scope. See CONTRIBUTING.md.
-->
